# Hihie's Scent OS

Hihie's Scent OS is a personal fragrance web application created by Nguyen Khai Tri. It recommends perfumes from a personal collection using weather, location, local time, mood, usage context and fragrance-layering logic.

## Primary pages
- App: https://perfume.khaitringuyen.com/
- Creator portfolio: https://khaitringuyen.com/
- Scent OS case study: https://khaitringuyen.com/projects/scent-os.html
- Creator projects: https://khaitringuyen.com/projects/
- Creator articles: https://khaitringuyen.com/articles/
- Contact: https://khaitringuyen.com/contact.html

## Creator
Nguyen Khai Tri is a Senior Performance Marketing Specialist working across paid media, analytics, CRM, data visualization and AI automation.

## Core capabilities
- Weather- and location-aware perfume recommendations
- Mood and occasion selection
- Layering formulas
- Personal fragrance collection search
- Perfumer and fragrance-family exploration
